title: onagra
intro: Onagra, also known as Evening Primrose, is a biennial flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its delicate, pink or yellow flowers and edible seeds. The plant is rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable medicinal plant. The medicinal properties of Evening Primrose include reducing inflammation, promoting skin health, and alleviating symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), while its health benefits include supporting heart health, improving cognitive function, and aiding in the management of autoimmune disorders. Evening Primrose can be prepared as an herbal supplement in oil or capsule form, or used as a topical cream to harness its medicinal properties.
